title: UPSSSC Cane Supervisor Vacancy 2026, Notification Out, Apply Online For 1182 Posts -
how_to_apply: Visit the official website https://upsssc.gov.in Find and click the “Recruitment Link” or “Apply Online” link on the homepage. First, register – enter your name, email, mobile number, and password. After registering, log in and focus on the application form—specifically, the personal details, qualifications, and selection of the position. Upload required documents: Photograph (JPG, max 50KB), Signature (JPG, max 20KB), Educational Certificates, ID Proof, Caste Certificate (if applicable). Pay the
jobs_info: UPSSSC Cane Supervisor Vacancy 2026: Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has issued a notification for the position of Sugarcane Supervisor. The recruitment drive comprises 1182 vacancies. All eligible and interested candidates are advised to carefully read the official notification and apply before 28-07-2026, the last Date. All relevant information regarding the UPSSSC Cane Supervisor Vacancy 2026 recruitment is provided below.

vacancy_details.eligibility: Degree in Agriculture and Computer Course “O” Level, UP PET 2025 Exam Passed.
